subcodes.first_line: O Leaf! This is a leaf We have sent unto thee, that thou mayest inhale therefrom the fragrance of God and be among [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ورقه هذه ورقه قد ارسلناها الیک لتجدی منها رایحه الله و تکونی من
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
